text.title: Design Debt Audit Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → validated artefact.

example.title: Anchored application
example.code:
# Trigger Quarterly review for Design Debt Audit on engagement E-2026-014.
# Inputs gathered - toggl-export-q1.csv (24 weeks of hours, billable + admin split) - pipeline-ledger-2026-q1.md (signed + qualified pipeline, 90-day window) - engagement-notes/E-2026-014.md (named decider: Maria Lopes — confirmed authority)
# Rule evaluation - r1 .. r5 all pass with cited inputs (see scripts/validate-<slug>.py output)
# Artefact produced artefact_id: q1-2026-design-debt-audit-E-014 owner: Maria Lopes (VP Operations) — handle @maria.lopes decision: raise floor rate from $125 to $140 effective Q2 2026 rationale: Realised $/hr sustained at $138 across three months, pipeline coverage 1.4x, utilization 71% (upper band). r5 cite: data-driven raise signal. inputs_used: toggl-export-q1.csv, pipeline-ledger-2026-q1.md version: 1.0.0 last_reviewed: 2026-05-23 status: ready for owner review
example.note: Each rule has a cited input; owner is a named human; rationale references at least two specific inputs by name; artefact is registered with semver + last_reviewed.

example.title: Un-anchored application
example.code:
# Trigger 'We should probably look at rates this quarter.'
# Inputs gathered - 'gut feel' - 'what the market does'
# Artefact produced 'Raise the rate. Everyone agrees.'
example.note: No typed inputs; owner missing; rationale not cite-grounded; no version or last_reviewed. Fails every required field in 02-output-contract.
